1701120.name: Behind the Frame: The Finest Scenery - Soundtrack
1701120.description:
Background Music


Composed and Arranged by Yuchain Wang 王昱辰 & Sung-Yueh Chou 周頌玥


Personnel
Cellos - Yu-Shin Yeh 葉欲新
Vocals & Cellos - Sung-Yueh Chou 周頌玥
Double Bass - Hungli Chen 陳弘禮
Flugelhorn - Fu-Hei Lee 李福海
Pianos, Keyboards, Guitars, Bass, Drums, Vocals - Yuchain Wang 王昱辰

Theme Song “The Color You Love the Most”


Performed by Peiyu Hung 洪佩瑜 ＆ Yuchain Wang 王昱辰
Composed and Written by Yuchain Wang 王昱辰
Arranged by Yuchain Wang 王昱辰
Vocal Guide by Christina Chen 陳乃嘉


Personnel
Vocals - Peiyu Hung 洪佩瑜
Guitars - Kevin Lin 林建文
Double Bass & Electric Bass - Hungli Chen 陳弘禮
Pianos, Guitars, Synthesizers, Drums, Vocals 王昱辰

All Tracks Produced, Recorded & Mixed by Yuchain Wang 王昱辰 @ MoriSound Studio, Taipei, Taiwan
Mastered by Mandy Parnell @ Black Saloon Studios, London, UK
